landing.heroDescription: The all-in-one tool for professionals. Client tracking, service history, analytics and more.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Tools designed for your daily professional life
landing.featureClientsDesc: Complete client profiles with history, notes and customizable fields.
landing.featurePrestationsDesc: Record every service with pricing, details and payment method.
landing.featureStatsDesc: Revenue, top clients, breakdowns and trends at a glance.
landing.featureCustomDesc: Adapt input fields to your business: hair, beauty, wellness...
landing.featureMultiUserDesc: Invite your employees and manage access with dedicated roles.
landing.featureResponsiveDesc: Responsive web app, usable on desktop, tablet and smartphone.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your Prestio workspace

login.resetNoEmail: Please enter your email to reset your password

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial

register.errorPasswordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase, one lowercase and one number
register.errorTerms: You must accept the terms of service
register.errorEmailUsed: This email is already in use
